response.justification: While Bogdan is a highly experienced Staff Software Engineer with strong distributed systems and architectural skills, he falls significantly short of the core minimum qualification of 8 years of C++ programming. His professional background is predominantly rooted in full-stack web technologies, TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang, making him a poor technical fit for a C++-centric Cloud Compute Platform Technical Lead role.
strengths: Proven experience building and scaling high-throughput distributed systems and microservices.
Demonstrated commitment to mentoring and engineering best practices through organizing dojos, teaching workshops, and driving TDD.
Solid hands-on experience with cloud-native infrastructure, including Kubernetes, Docker, and AWS CDK.
concerns: Falls drastically short of the minimum 8 years of C++ programming experience, possessing less than one year professionally.
Primary technical expertise is in full-stack web and product development rather than low-level cloud compute platforms and hardware architecture.
Limited explicit evidence of managing cross-team alignment, deliverables, and project priorities in a dedicated Technical Lead capacity.
